complete_action_identifier: S_EH+S_GHY+S_DFM_MKC+S_b+S_r with the fixed canonical potential and merged Schutz-Sorkin sectors
action: The exact ADM plus GHY density is N sqrt(h)[R3+K_ij K^ij-K^2-2 Lambda]/(16 pi G); the DFM-MKC density is sqrt(-g)[-alpha(nabla phi)^2/2-beta phi^2(nabla theta)^2/2-U(phi)]; each visible density is -sqrt(-g)rho_I(n_I)-J_I^mu partial_mu ell_I.
conventions: Conformal time, N=a(1+A), N_i=a^2 partial_i B, h_ij=a^2[(1-2psi)delta_ij+2 partial_i partial_j E], exp(i k.x), k^2>0; every field and first conformal-time derivative is an independent jet.
variables: Ordered as A, B, psi, E, delta_phi, delta_theta, delta J_b^0, delta J_b,L, delta ell_b, delta J_r^0, delta J_r,L, delta ell_r.
eh_ghy_sector: Derived by exact expansion of N sqrt(h)[R3+K_ij K^ij-K^2-2 Lambda]/(16 pi G). The optimized k-aligned diagonal representative is checked against a separate 3x3 matrix calculation using determinant, inverse metric, spatial Christoffels, Ricci scalar, covariant shift derivatives, and extrinsic curvature.
dfm_sector: Derived directly from the fixed covariant two-scalar density after exact ADM substitution; lapse and shift couplings include delta_phi, delta_theta and their independent first-time-derivative jets.
visible_sector: The pair density is exactly twice the spatially averaged epsilon-squared coefficient, and its ordinary second derivatives equal every imported A,B,current entry. All temporal and spatial current-potential entries are reconstructed independently from -J^mu partial_mu ell, including the formal-adjoint temporal orientation.
total_lapse_shift_operator: build_total_scalar_lapse_shift_hessian returns A and B rows as c0+c1 partial_eta and columns from an independent Euler second variation. Exact background differentiation gives the adjoint c0-D_eta(c1)-c1 partial_eta.
hamiltonian_row: hamiltonian_constraint_row starts from the unexpanded Einstein-Hilbert plus GHY, DFM, baryon, and radiation actions carrying two independent perturbation parameters, varies first in the lapse direction and then in every scalar direction, and has an entrywise-zero residual against the independently assembled A operator row.
momentum_row: momentum_constraint_row starts from the unexpanded Einstein-Hilbert plus GHY, DFM, baryon, and radiation actions carrying two independent perturbation parameters, varies first in the shift direction and then in every scalar direction, and has an entrywise-zero residual against the independently assembled B operator row.
background_equations: background_residuals derives the eight exact homogeneous Euler-Lagrange residuals. background_on_shell_chart solves them with explicit pivots Lambda, H_prime, phi_bar_double_prime, theta_bar_double_prime, Jbar_b_0_prime, Jbar_r_0_prime, ell_bar_b_prime, and ell_bar_r_prime. background_residual_decomposition independently substitutes that chart into reconstructed A and B rows and derives every off-shell minus on-shell coefficient by exact algebraic inversion of the residual-to-pivot map.
boundary_terms: For every c(eta) partial_eta entry, integration by parts gives integral u c v' = -integral (c u)'v + [u c v] from eta_i to eta_f. The visible pair is H[J0,ell]=-partial_eta and H[ell,J0]=+partial_eta, with [delta J0 delta ell] vanishing under the inherited endpoint condition.
certificates: Every positive certificate flag is computed from an exact zero residual family: Fourier normalization, complete visible import, independent full-matrix ADM, original-action two-parameter Hamiltonian and momentum variations, exact formal adjoints, the derived background-chart residual decomposition, and original-action direct mixed differentiation with its explicit total-derivative boundary contribution.
domain_conditions: The background chart records every solved denominator and requires a!=0, G!=0, alpha!=0, beta!=0, phi_bar!=0 (in particular the nondegenerate beta*phi_bar^2 theta chart), Jbar_b^0!=0, and Jbar_r^0!=0; the declared physical domain additionally has these quantities positive where stated, m_b>0, kappa_r>0, and k^2>0. No division by these quantities is implicit. Also required are a nondegenerate Lorentzian ADM metric, smooth commuting variations, Fourier reality pairing, and the stated temporal and spatial boundary conditions.
limitations: This establishes only the canonical total scalar lapse-shift Hessian, its action-derived Hamiltonian and scalar momentum rows, auxiliary lapse-shift character, and readiness for later constraint elimination. It does not establish a reduced physical scalar action, action-bound Weyl observable, prediction vector, identifiability, LCDM separation, measurable margin, novelty, or new science.
provenance: Exact SymPy jet derivation bound to theory/deformation_field.md, visible_sector_action_v1.py, visible_sector_offshell_scalar_hessian_v1.py and its artifact, scalar_constraint_variational_bridge_v1.py only as a multiplier carrier, scalar_bardeen_weyl_observable_v1.py, and metric_constraint_elimination_v1.py; no constraint-carrier coefficient was copied.
